title: convolvulus supinus var. leucotrichus
intro: Convolvulus supinus var. leucotrichus, also known as the dwarf morning glory, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Convolvulaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Convolvulus supinus var. leucotrichus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and provide relief from pain and inflammation. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves and stems can be used to make herbal teas, tinctures, or salves to harness its medicinal properties.
